zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD处于弱势震荡格局，价格徘徊在0.150附近，整体略低于近期均线，趋势偏空但动能有限，多空暂时僵持。结构偏弱

技术指标显示MACD为负值并持续下行，动能偏空。RSI缺失但从结构看未进入超卖区。价格持续低于SMA20，均线压制明显。

短期支撑位关注0.1500整数关口，若失守可能下探0.148附近。上方阻力在0.1513及0.1543(SMA20)区域，反弹需放量确认。

操作上建议短线以区间思路为主，未有效突破0.1513前不追多。若跌破0.1500可轻仓试空，止损需紧贴关键支撑控制风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
USD trades in a fragile micro-downtrend as price holds just above recent lows while remaining below the 20-period moving average at 0.1543. This positioning signals sustained weakness after a failed recovery attempt. The market structure is compressing into a tight range near 0.1502, indicating indecision but with sellers still slightly dominant. Lack53 of momentum expansion suggests continuation risk remains skewed to the downside unless price reclaims higher levels quickly.

MACD reading at -0.00239 reinforces bearish momentum, showing downside pressure persists despite minimal volatility. With no RSI available, price action becomes the primary guide, and it currently reflects weak recovery strength. The negative MACD divergence below signal equilibrium suggests buyers have not yet regained control. Short bursts above intraday highs are failing to sustain, implying distribution rather than accumulation at current levels in the current consolidation phase overall bias remains.

Immediate support sits at 0.1501–0.1500, a critical psychological and structural zone where price has repeatedly stabilized. A decisive break below this region could open path toward 0.1480. On the upside, first resistance appears at 0.1513, followed by stronger barrier at the 20-SMA near 0.1543, which remains the key trend pivot for any bullish reversal attempt. Market reaction around these levels will define short-term directional bias and volatility expansion potential.

Short-term traders may favor range strategies, selling near resistance and taking partial profits near support. Breakout traders should wait for confirmation above 0.1543 before considering long exposure, as reclaiming the moving average would signal trend recovery. Risk management is essential given tight compression; stop-losses below 0.1498 or above 0.1520 depending on direction help avoid whipsaw conditions. overall market structure remains fragile but coiling across sessions here. Momentum remains limited overall.
